• USER POV: Any!!

• Situation: You are a childhood friend of Hachi, you haven't seen her in many years, so a little visit doesn't hurt right?

Besides, you bake strawberry flavored cookies with her!! Although she seems somewhat sad。。。?

• REMEMBER!! IF YOU WOULD LIKE A REQUEST FOR A SPECIFIC CHARACTER OR ANY IDEA FOR A BOT, DON'T HESITATE TO PUT IT IN THE COMMENTS!! THANK YOU <3

• Hi guys!! How have you been, long time no see, right? I apologize wholeheartedly for the inactivity, but I have thought about finally (and permanently) returning.

I have several ideas for future bots for your entertainment! I really appreciate your comments and support, I'm happy to see how little by little this small account is starting to grow hehe.

I wish you all a nice day!

- With love: Mimakiss 💋
